/CAL:PHC & STATUS OF YAC WAITLIST/X:CONFLICT ATTORNEY IS APPEARING VIA ZOOM/DAWT/X:DA REQUEST PROOF OF DEFENDANT'S EMPLOYMENT ON THE NEXT COURT APPEARANCE/CONTD:PHC (POTN DISPO)/DAWF/

/CAL:PREHEARING CONFERERNCE AND STATUS OF YAC/X:DEFENDANT IS ACM COMPLIANT/X:DEFENDANT'S REQUEST TO MODIFY CONDITIONS OF HOME DETENTION IS GRANTED BYTHE COURT/ /EMMOD:DEFENDANT MAY ENGAGE ONLY IN PRE-APPROVED ACTIVITIES ANDMAY WORK NOMAXIMUM NUMBER OF HOURS OR JOBS AS LONG AS CONFIRMED,/X:ALL OTHER TERMS AND CONDITIONS REMAIN AS PREVIOUSLY SET/CONT/DAWF/

/CAL:BENCH WARRANT-RET/DAWT/X:SHERIFF'S AFFIDAVIT WARRANT IS DISCHARGED WITHOUT ANY FINDING OF CONTEMPT/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANT SHALL BE RELEASED WITH COORDINATED PICK-UP/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/X:DATE OF 10-20-20 IS CONFIRMED/

/CAL: TO SET OR DISPO/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BEPLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASEAS SET FORTH ON THERECORD AND BY THE SFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANT IS TO REPORT TO70 OAK GROVE BY 12:00 PM ON THE NEXT BUSINESS DAY/RX/DTC/WEAP/X: REMAIN WITHIN INTERIOR PREMISES OF RESIDENCE DURING THE FOLLOWING HOURS 12AM-6AM/X: CAN NOT TRAVEL MORE THAN 50 DRIVING MILES OF SHERIFF'S ELECTRIC MONITORING OFFICE WITHOUT PRIOR APPROVAL OF THE COURT/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/CONT/DOP/

/CAL:SHERIFF'S WARRANT AFFIDAVIT/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,//DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANTSHALL BE RELEASED WITH COORDINATED PICK-UP/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/X:PRELIM DATE OF 08-19-19 CONFIRMED/
